calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing for Possession Only. Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Scott Hughes, CSR #12365.

Michael Heath, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Vikramsinh Devdhara, who was placed under oath and examined.
Vishny Shah, Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Welsey A. Lee, a/k/a Lee A. Welsey.
Defendant's answer to the complaint was filed on October 28, 2010.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was filed on November 3, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Vikramsinh Devdhara, and against defendant Welsey A. Lee, a/k/a Lee A. Welsey, as follows:

Plaintiff Vikramsinh Devdhara is entitned to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 481 Minna Street, #131, San Francisco, CA 94103. The rental agreement is canceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by defendant.
The trial date of NOV-22-2010 remains on calendar.
